# Terms of Service — Quantoryn

**Effective date**: 2026-03-05
**Last updated**: 2026-03-05
**Contact**: support@quantoryn.com
**Location**: Córdoba, Argentina

---

## 1. Agreement

By accessing or using Quantoryn ("the Platform"), you agree to these Terms of Service.

If you are using the Platform on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have
authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

---

## 2. Platform description

Quantoryn is a private, organization-scoped coaching platform. It allows coaches to:

- Create and manage structured training plans for athletes
- Connect athlete accounts to third-party activity providers via OAuth
- Receive and analyse completed activity data from those providers
- Apply training load analytics and generate coaching insights

The Platform is not a consumer application, a social network, or a public activity feed.
Access is mediated by a coach organization account.

---

## 3. Accounts and responsibilities

### 3.1 Coach organization accounts

A coach account represents an organization and its owner is the organization administrator.
The administrator is responsible for:

- All athletes registered under the organization
- Obtaining athlete consent before connecting their provider accounts
- Maintaining the accuracy of data entered on behalf of athletes
- Keeping login credentials confidential
- Ensuring that use of the Platform complies with applicable laws

### 3.2 Athlete accounts

Athletes are added to the Platform by their coach. Athletes may disconnect their provider
integrations at any time. Athlete data is not accessible by other organizations.

### 3.3 API partner accounts

Third-party providers granted API access to Quantoryn are subject to a separate API
Partnership Agreement in addition to these Terms. Contact partnerships@quantoryn.com.

---

## 4. Acceptable use

You may use the Platform only for lawful coaching and training analytics purposes.

You may not:

- Attempt to access data belonging to another organization
- Circumvent authentication, tenant isolation, or rate limiting controls
- Use the Platform to process data for purposes other than coaching analytics
- Resell or sublicense access to the Platform without a written agreement
- Introduce malicious code or conduct automated attacks against the Platform or its users
- Use athlete data for advertising, profiling, or any commercial purpose beyond coaching

---

## 5. Third-party provider integrations

Connecting to a third-party provider (e.g. Strava) is subject to that provider's
own terms and privacy policy. Quantoryn is not responsible for data practices of
third-party providers.

By connecting a provider account, the coach confirms that:

- The athlete has authorized the connection
- Data received will be used exclusively for coaching purposes within the organization
- The connection will be revoked if the athlete withdraws consent

---

## 6. Athlete data ownership

Athletes retain ownership of their personal data at all times.

- Coaches may use athlete data only for coaching analytics within the Platform
- Coaches may not export, transfer, or sell athlete data to any third party
- Athletes may request deletion of their data at any time (see Privacy Policy)

---

## 7. Intellectual property

The Quantoryn platform, codebase, analytics models, and documentation are the intellectual
property of the platform operator. All rights reserved except as explicitly granted.

User-generated content — training plans, activity data, coaching notes — remains the
property of the respective data subjects. Quantoryn asserts no intellectual property
rights over user data.

---

## 8. Service availability

The Platform is provided on an as-is, as-available basis. We do not guarantee:

- Uninterrupted or error-free service
- Continuous availability of third-party provider APIs
- Specific response times for analytics computation

Planned maintenance will be communicated in advance where practicable.

---

## 9. Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by applicable law:

- Quantoryn is not liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages
  arising from use of the Platform
- The Platform provides analytical tools — it does not replace the judgment of a qualified
  coach or medical professional
- Quantoryn's total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amounts paid for the
  Platform in the twelve months prior to the claim

---

## 10. Termination

Quantoryn may suspend or terminate access if these Terms are violated, payment is not
received, or continued operation presents a security risk.

Upon termination, data will be retained for 30 days to allow export and then deleted.

---

## 11. Governing law

These Terms are governed by the laws of Argentina. Disputes shall be resolved in the
courts of Córdoba, Argentina, unless a separate written agreement specifies otherwise.

---

## 12. Contact
